taxdiv: Taxonomic Diversity Indices Using Deng Entropy

Source: R/taxdiv-package.R
taxdiv-package.Rd

Calculates taxonomic diversity indices for ecological community data using Deng entropy framework and classical approaches (Shannon, Simpson, Clarke & Warwick). Provides functions for computing taxonomic distinctness, average taxonomic distinctness (AvTD/Delta+), variation in taxonomic distinctness (VarTD/Lambda+), and Deng entropy-based measures that incorporate taxonomic hierarchy information. Includes tools for constructing taxonomic trees and computing pairwise taxonomic distances. Methods are described in Ozkan (2018) doi:10.18182/tjf.441061 , Ozkan (2018) doi:10.26650/forestist.2018.340634 , Clarke & Warwick (1998) doi:10.1046/j.1365-2664.1998.3540523.x , Ozkan & Mert (2022) doi:10.5152/forestist.2021.21025 , Shannon (1948) doi:10.1002/j.1538-7305.1948.tb01338.x , and Simpson (1949) doi:10.1038/163688a0 .
